name: Thalassa Vonderheide
summary: Accomplished Senior Fullstack Developer with over 9 years of experience in architecting scalable web applications and leading cross-functional engineering teams. Expert in modern JavaScript ecosystems and cloud-native infrastructure, with a proven track record of optimizing system performance and reducing technical debt.

experience.title: Senior Fullstack Engineer
experience.description: Lead the development of a high-traffic e-commerce platform using React and Node.js, resulting in a 30% improvement in page load speeds. Mentor junior developers and oversee architectural decisions for microservices migration.

experience.title: Fullstack Developer
experience.description: Developed secure financial transaction modules using TypeScript and PostgreSQL. Collaborated with product managers to implement agile workflows that increased sprint velocity by 20%.

experience.title: Software Engineer
experience.description: Built and maintained responsive front-end interfaces and RESTful APIs for enterprise clients. Assisted in the transition from monolithic architecture to containerized services using Docker.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Software Engineering
